arts.ttl: Arsenal given huge Raheem Sterling decision after January transfer wildcard option emerges
arts.sum: Reports this week have claimed that Brighton and Hove Albion striker Evan Ferguson is available on loan after being unable to get game time under Fabian Hurzeler. Sterling's loan move from London rivals Chelsea came about to improve Arteta's options in attack.

arts.ttl: Sporting v Arsenal, Bayern Munich v PSG, and more: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates, fifth round of games Live scoreboard | Man City v Feyenoord | Email Niall It’s finished Slovan Bratislava 2-3 Milan, the Slovak side staying bottom of the pile with no points from five games. They gave it a good go here, though – unlike Sparta Prague, who have been gubbed 6-0 by Atlético Madrid. Those results mean Atlético and Milan sit ninth and 10th respectively, breathing down Aston Villa’s necks in the battle for the top eight. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres latest: Arsenal & Man Utd receive NIGHTMARE news
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly joined the race to sign Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyokeres following news that Erling Haaland is set to extend his Manchester City contract. In a bid to beat both Arsenal and Man Utd to Gyokeres next year, Real Madrid are reportedly set to offer Sporting CP the chance to sign Endrick on a season-long loan deal.

arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: The teenaged attacker has been playing in higher age groups for Watford, including their Under-21s, for whom he has scored despite still only being 15.

arts.ttl: Barcelona considering ingenious way to lower asking price of Viktor Gyokeres
arts.sum: Barcelona are looking to the striker market ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window, as they aim to secure the services of Robert Lewandowski’s successor. In recent months, the name of Viktor Gyokeres has featured prominently amongst the speculation, with the Swedish striker having already amassed 33 goals for club and country this season.
